coachAM: Your scattered focus and susceptibility to "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" directly sabotage your Sleep Protocol and Training, creating a feedback loop where physical depletion erodes the discipline needed for Sovereign Morning and deep work. The root cause is a fundamental lack of self-governance in the face of digital distraction, which is fracturing your ability to convert intention into consistent execution and will ultimately derail your elite trajectory by preventing the sustained deep work required for breakthrough impact. Today, before anything else, disable all non-essential notifications on your phone and place it in a separate room for the first 90 minutes of your day.
